name: Lingo
description: Lingo is a first person indie puzzle game in the vein of The Witness.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Shuffle Doors
options.description: This option specifies how doors open.

options.label: Group Doors
options.description: By default, door shuffle in either panels or doors mode will create individual keys for every panel or door to be locked.

options.label: Progressive Orange Tower
options.description: When "Shuffle Doors" is on doors mode, this setting governs the manner in which the Orange Tower floors open up.

options.label: Progressive Colorful
options.description: When "Shuffle Doors" is on either panels or doors mode and "Group Doors" is off, this setting governs the manner in which The Colorful opens up.

options.label: Location Checks
options.description: Determines what locations are available.

options.label: Shuffle Colors
options.description: If on, an item is added to the pool for every puzzle color (besides White).

options.label: Shuffle Panels
options.description: Determines how panel puzzles are randomized.

options.label: Shuffle Paintings
options.description: If on, the destination, location, and appearance of the painting warps in the game will be randomized.

options.label: Enable Pilgrimage
options.description: Determines how the pilgrimage works.

options.label: Pilgrimage Allows Roof Access
options.description: If on, you may use the Crossroads roof access during a pilgrimage (and you may be expected to do so).

options.label: Pilgrimage Allows Paintings
options.description: If on, you may use paintings during a pilgrimage (and you may be expected to do so).

options.label: Sunwarp Access
options.description: Determines how access to sunwarps works.

options.label: Shuffle Sunwarps
options.description: If on, the pairing and ordering of the sunwarps in the game will be randomized.

options.label: Victory Condition
options.description: Change the victory condition.

options.label: Mastery Achievements
options.description: The number of achievements required to unlock THE MASTER.

options.label: Level 2 Requirement
options.description: The number of panel solves required to unlock LEVEL 2.

options.label: Early Color Hallways
options.description: When on, a painting warp to the color hallways area will appear in the starting room.

options.label: Shuffle Postgame
options.description: When off, locations that could not be reached without also reaching your victory condition are removed.

options.label: Trap Percentage
options.description: Replaces junk items with traps, at the specified rate.

options.label: Speed Boost Mode
options.description: If on, the player's default speed is halved, as if affected by a Slowness Trap.

options.label: Puzzle Skip Percentage
options.description: Replaces junk items with puzzle skips, at the specified rate.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: If on: Whenever another player on death link dies, you will be returned to the starting room.
